 21→import javax.inject.Inject
 22→import javax.inject.Named

 24→class DashboardCardPersonalizationViewModelSlice @Inject constructor(
 25→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 26→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 27→    private val selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository,
 28→    private val bloggingRemindersStore: BloggingRemindersStore,
 29→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 30→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils,
 31→    private val bloggingPromptsSettingsHelper: BloggingPromptsSettingsHelper
 32→) {
 33→    private val _uiState = MutableLiveData<List<DashboardCardState>>()
 34→    val uiState: LiveData<List<DashboardCardState>> = _uiState
 35→
 36→    lateinit var scope: CoroutineScope
 37→
 38→    fun initialize(viewModelScope: CoroutineScope) {
 39→        this.scope = viewModelScope
 40→    }
 41→
 42→    fun start(siteId: Long) {
 43→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 44→            _uiState.postValue(getCardStates(siteId))
 45→        }
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    private suspend fun getCardStates(siteId: Long): List<DashboardCardState> {
 49→        val selectedSite = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()
 50→        val dashboardCardStates = mutableListOf<DashboardCardState>()
 51→        dashboardCardStates.add(statsCard(siteId))
 52→        dashboardCardStates.add(draftPostsCard(siteId))
 53→        dashboardCardStates.add(getScheduledPostsCard(siteId))
 54→        selectedSite?.let {
 55→            getPagesCardState(siteId, selectedSite)?.let { dashboardCardStates.add(it) }
 56→            getActivityLogCard(siteId, selectedSite)?.let { dashboardCardStates.add(it) }
 57→            getBlazeCardState(siteId, selectedSite)?.let { dashboardCardStates.add(it) }
 58→        }
 59→        getBloggingPromptCardState()?.let { dashboardCardStates.add(it) }
 60→        return dashboardCardStates.toList()
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private suspend fun getBloggingPromptCardState(): DashboardCardState? {
 64→        return if (bloggingPromptsSettingsHelper.shouldShowPromptsFeature()) {
 65→            DashboardCardState(
 66→                title = R.string.personalization_screen_blogging_prompts_card_title,
 67→                description = R.string.personalization_screen_blogging_prompts_card_description,
 68→                enabled = isPromptsSettingEnabled(selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSiteLocalId()),
 69→                cardType = CardType.BLOGGING_PROMPTS
 70→            )
 71→        } else null
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    private fun getBlazeCardState(siteId: Long, selectedSite: SiteModel): DashboardCardState? {
 75→        if (blazeFeatureUtils.isSiteBlazeEligible(selectedSite)) {
 76→            return DashboardCardState(
 77→                title = R.string.personalization_screen_blaze_card_title,
 78→                description = R.string.personalization_screen_blaze_card_description,
 79→                enabled = isBlazeCardShown(siteId),
 80→                cardType = CardType.BLAZE
 81→            )
 82→        }
 83→        return null
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    private fun getActivityLogCard(siteId: Long, selectedSite: SiteModel): DashboardCardState? {
 87→        if (selectedSite.hasCapabilityManageOptions && !selectedSite.isWpForTeamsSite) {
 88→            return DashboardCardState(
 89→                title = R.string.personalization_screen_activity_log_card_title,
 90→                description = R.string.personalization_screen_activity_log_card_description,
 91→                enabled = isActivityLogCardShown(siteId),
 92→                cardType = CardType.ACTIVITY_LOG
 93→            )
 94→        }
 95→        return null
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun getScheduledPostsCard(siteId: Long) = DashboardCardState(
 99→        title = R.string.personalization_screen_scheduled_posts_card_title,
100→        description = R.string.personalization_screen_scheduled_posts_card_description,
101→        enabled = isScheduledPostsCardShown(siteId),
102→        cardType = CardType.SCHEDULED_POSTS
103→    )
104→
105→    private fun draftPostsCard(siteId: Long) = DashboardCardState(
106→        title = R.string.personalization_screen_draft_posts_card_title,
107→        description = R.string.personalization_screen_draft_posts_card_description,
108→        enabled = isDraftPostsCardShown(siteId),
109→        cardType = CardType.DRAFT_POSTS
110→    )
111→
112→    private fun statsCard(siteId: Long) = DashboardCardState(
113→        title = R.string.personalization_screen_stats_card_title,
114→        description = R.string.personalization_screen_stats_card_description,
115→        enabled = isStatsCardShown(siteId),
116→        cardType = CardType.STATS
117→    )
118→
119→    private fun getPagesCardState(siteId: Long, selectedSite: SiteModel): DashboardCardState? {
120→        return if (selectedSite.hasCapabilityEditPages || selectedSite.isSelfHostedAdmin) {
121→            DashboardCardState(
122→                title = R.string.personalization_screen_pages_card_title,
123→                description = R.string.personalization_screen_pages_card_description,
124→                enabled = isPagesCardShown(siteId),
125→                cardType = CardType.PAGES
126→            )
127→        } else {
128→            null
129→        }
130→    }
131→
132→
133→    fun onCardToggled(cardType: CardType, enabled: Boolean) {
134→        val siteId = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()!!.siteId
135→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
136→            trackCardToggle(cardType, enabled)
137→            when (cardType) {
138→                CardType.STATS -> appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideTodaysStatsDashboardCard(siteId, !enabled)
139→                CardType.DRAFT_POSTS -> appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHidePostDashboardCard(
140→                    siteId,
141→                    PostCardType.DRAFT.name,
142→                    !enabled
143→                )
144→
145→                CardType.SCHEDULED_POSTS -> appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHidePostDashboardCard(
146→                    siteId,
147→                    PostCardType.SCHEDULED.name,
148→                    !enabled
149→                )
150→
151→                CardType.PAGES -> appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHidePagesDashboardCard(siteId, !enabled)
152→                CardType.ACTIVITY_LOG -> appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideActivityDashboardCard(siteId, !enabled)
153→                CardType.BLAZE -> appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideBlazeCard(siteId, !enabled)
154→                CardType.BLOGGING_PROMPTS -> updatePromptsCardEnabled(enabled)
155→            }
156→            // update the ui state
157→            updateCardState(cardType, enabled)
158→        }
159→    }
160→
161→    private fun trackCardToggle(cardType: CardType, enabled: Boolean) {
162→        if (enabled) trackCardShown(cardType)
163→        else trackCardHidden(cardType)
164→    }
165→
166→    private fun trackCardHidden(cardType: CardType) {
167→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
168→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.PERSONALIZATION_SCREEN_CARD_HIDE_TAPPED,
169→            mapOf(CARD_TYPE_TRACK_PARAM to cardType.trackingName)
170→        )
171→    }
172→
173→    private fun trackCardShown(cardType: CardType) {
174→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
175→            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.PERSONALIZATION_SCREEN_CARD_SHOW_TAPPED,
176→            mapOf(CARD_TYPE_TRACK_PARAM to cardType.trackingName)
177→        )
178→    }
179→
180→    private fun updateCardState(cardType: CardType, enabled: Boolean) {
181→        val currentCards: MutableList<DashboardCardState> = _uiState.value!!.toMutableList()
182→        val updated = currentCards.find { it.cardType == cardType }!!.copy(enabled = enabled)
183→        currentCards[cardType.order] = updated
184→        _uiState.postValue(currentCards)
185→    }
186→
187→    private fun isStatsCardShown(siteId: Long) = !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideTodaysStatsDashboardCard(siteId)
188→
189→    private fun isDraftPostsCardShown(siteId: Long) =
190→        !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHidePostDashboardCard(siteId, PostCardType.DRAFT.name)
191→
192→    private fun isScheduledPostsCardShown(siteId: Long) =
193→        !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHidePostDashboardCard(siteId, PostCardType.SCHEDULED.name)
194→
195→    private fun isPagesCardShown(siteId: Long) = !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHidePagesDashboardCard(siteId)
196→
197→    private fun isActivityLogCardShown(siteId: Long) = !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideActivityDashboardCard(siteId)
198→
199→    private fun isBlazeCardShown(siteId: Long) = !appPrefsWrapper.hideBlazeCard(siteId)
200→
201→    private suspend fun isPromptsSettingEnabled(
202→        siteId: Int
203→    ): Boolean = bloggingRemindersStore
204→        .bloggingRemindersModel(siteId)
205→        .firstOrNull()
206→        ?.isPromptsCardEnabled == true
207→
208→    private suspend fun updatePromptsCardEnabled(isEnabled: Boolean) {
209→        val siteId = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSiteLocalId()
210→        val current = bloggingRemindersStore.bloggingRemindersModel(siteId).firstOrNull() ?: return
211→        bloggingRemindersStore.updateBloggingReminders(current.copy(isPromptsCardEnabled = isEnabled))
212→    }
213→
214→    fun onCleared() {
215→        this.scope.cancel()
216→    }
217→}

  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher

 11→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD

 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.jetpack.JetpackCapabilitiesUseCase
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem

 21→import javax.inject.Inject
 22→import javax.inject.Named
 23→
 24→const val SHORTCUT_NAME_TRACKING_PARAMETER = "type"
 25→
 26→class ShortcutsPersonalizationViewModelSlice @Inject constructor(
 27→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 28→    private val siteItemsBuilder: SiteItemsBuilder,
 29→    private val jetpackCapabilitiesUseCase: JetpackCapabilitiesUseCase,
 30→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils,
 31→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 32→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 33→) {
 34→    lateinit var scope: CoroutineScope
 35→
 36→    fun initialize(scope: CoroutineScope) {
 37→        this.scope = scope
 38→    }
 39→
 40→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(ShortcutsState(emptyList(), emptyList()))
 41→
 42→    val uiState: StateFlow<ShortcutsState> = _uiState
 43→
 44→    fun start(site: SiteModel) {
 45→        convertToShortCutsState(
 46→            items = siteItemsBuilder.build(
 47→                MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.SiteItemsBuilderParams(
 48→                    site = site,
 49→                    activeTask = null,
 50→                    backupAvailable = false,
 51→                    scanAvailable = false,
 52→                    enableFocusPoints = false,
 53→                    onClick = { },
 54→                    isBlazeEligible = isSiteBlazeEligible(site)
 55→                )
 56→            ),
 57→            site.siteId
 58→        )
 59→        updateSiteItemsForJetpackCapabilities(site)
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    private fun convertToShortCutsState(items: List<MySiteCardAndItem>, siteId: Long) {
 63→        val listItems = items.filterIsInstance(MySiteCardAndItem.Item.ListItem::class.java)
 64→        val shortcuts = listItems.map { listItem ->
 65→            ShortcutState(
 66→                icon = listItem.primaryIcon,
 67→                label = listItem.primaryText as UiString.UiStringRes,
 68→                disableTint = listItem.disablePrimaryIconTint,
 69→                isActive = isActiveShortcut(listItem.listItemAction, siteId),
 70→                listItemAction = listItem.listItemAction
 71→            )
 72→        }
 73→        groupByActiveAndInactiveShortcuts(shortcuts)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    private fun groupByActiveAndInactiveShortcuts(shortcuts: List<ShortcutState>) {
 77→        _uiState.value = ShortcutsState(
 78→            activeShortCuts = shortcuts.filter { it.isActive },
 79→            inactiveShortCuts = shortcuts.filter { !it.isActive }
 80→        )
 81→    }
 82→
 83→    private fun updateSiteItemsForJetpackCapabilities(site: SiteModel) {
 84→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 85→            jetpackCapabilitiesUseCase.getJetpackPurchasedProducts(site.siteId).collect {
 86→                convertToShortCutsState(
 87→                    items = siteItemsBuilder.build(
 88→                        MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.SiteItemsBuilderParams(
 89→                            site = site,
 90→                            activeTask = null,
 91→                            backupAvailable = it.backup,
 92→                            scanAvailable = (it.scan && !site.isWPCom && !site.isWPComAtomic),
 93→                            enableFocusPoints = false,
 94→                            onClick = { },
 95→                            isBlazeEligible = isSiteBlazeEligible(site)
 96→                        )
 97→                    ),
 98→                    siteId = site.siteId
 99→                )
100→            } // end collect
101→        }
102→    }
103→
104→    private fun isSiteBlazeEligible(site: SiteModel) =
105→        blazeFeatureUtils.isSiteBlazeEligible(site)
106→
107→    fun onCleared() {
108→        this.scope.cancel()
109→        jetpackCapabilitiesUseCase.clear()
110→    }
111→
112→    // Note: More item is not a list item and hence the check is dropped here, it will be shown as a quick link always
113→    private fun isActiveShortcut(listItemAction: ListItemAction, siteId: Long): Boolean {
114→        return when (listItemAction) {
115→            in defaultShortcuts() -> {
116→                appPrefsWrapper.getShouldShowDefaultQuickLink(
117→                    listItemAction.toString(), siteId
118→                )
119→            }
120→
121→            else -> {
122→                appPrefsWrapper.getShouldShowSiteItemAsQuickLink(
123→                    listItemAction.toString(), siteId
124→                )
125→            }
126→        }
127→    }
128→
129→    private fun defaultShortcuts(): List<ListItemAction> {
130→        return listOf(
131→            ListItemAction.POSTS,
132→            ListItemAction.PAGES,
133→            ListItemAction.STATS
134→        )
135→    }
136→
137→    fun removeShortcut(shortcutState: ShortcutState, siteId: Long) {
138→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
139→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
140→                AnalyticsTracker.Stat.PERSONALIZATION_SCREEN_SHORTCUT_HIDE_QUICK_LINK_TAPPED,
141→                mapOf(SHORTCUT_NAME_TRACKING_PARAMETER to shortcutState.listItemAction.trackingLabel)
142→            )
143→            if (shortcutState.listItemAction in defaultShortcuts())
144→                updateVisibilityOfDefaultShortcut(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, false)
145→            else updateVisibilityOfListItem(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, false)
146→            updateUiState(shortcutState, isActive = false)
147→        }
148→    }
149→
150→    fun addShortcut(shortcutState: ShortcutState, siteId: Long) {
151→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
152→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
153→                AnalyticsTracker.Stat.PERSONALIZATION_SCREEN_SHORTCUT_SHOW_QUICK_LINK_TAPPED,
154→                mapOf(SHORTCUT_NAME_TRACKING_PARAMETER to shortcutState.listItemAction.trackingLabel)
155→            )
156→            if (shortcutState.listItemAction in defaultShortcuts())
157→                updateVisibilityOfDefaultShortcut(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, true)
158→            else updateVisibilityOfListItem(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, true)
159→            updateUiState(shortcutState, isActive = true)
160→        }
161→    }
162→
163→    private fun updateUiState(shortcutState: ShortcutState, isActive: Boolean) {
164→        // is active means changed to active from inactive
165→        val currentState = _uiState.value
166→        val updatedState = shortcutState.copy(isActive = isActive)
167→        val activeShortcuts = currentState.activeShortCuts.toMutableList()
168→        val inactiveShortcuts = currentState.inactiveShortCuts.toMutableList()
169→        if (isActive) {
170→            inactiveShortcuts.remove(shortcutState)
171→            activeShortcuts.add(updatedState)
172→        } else {
173→            activeShortcuts.remove(shortcutState)
174→            inactiveShortcuts.add(updatedState)
175→        }
176→        _uiState.value = ShortcutsState(
177→            activeShortCuts = activeShortcuts,
178→            inactiveShortCuts = inactiveShortcuts
179→        )
180→    }
181→
182→    private fun updateVisibilityOfListItem(listItemAction: ListItemAction, siteId: Long, shouldShow: Boolean) {
183→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldShowSiteItemAsQuickLink(
184→            listItemAction.toString(), siteId, shouldShow
185→        )
186→    }
187→
188→    private fun updateVisibilityOfDefaultShortcut(listItemAction: ListItemAction, siteId: Long, shouldShow: Boolean) {
189→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldShowDefaultQuickLink(
190→            listItemAction.toString(), siteId, shouldShow
191→        )
192→    }
193→}

I have resolved the `IndexOutOfBoundsException` in the `DashboardCardPersonalizationViewModelSlice` class.

### Root Cause Analysis
The crash occurred in the `updateCardState` function because it was using the `order` property of the `CardType` enum as an index into the list of current card states. Since the list of cards is built conditionally (some cards are skipped if they are not applicable to the current site), the size of the list can be smaller than the maximum `order` value. For instance, if the `BLOGGING_PROMPTS` card (which has an `order` of 6) is present but some preceding cards are missing, the list will have fewer than 7 elements, and attempting to access index 6 will throw an `IndexOutOfBoundsException`.

### Fix
I modified the `updateCardState` function to:
1.  Safely access the current UI state using null-safe calls.
2.  Find the actual index of the card to be updated within the current list using `indexOfFirst` based on its `CardType`.
3.  Update the card at the correctly identified index.
4.  Only post the updated list if the card was actually found in the list.

This ensures that the update is always performed at the correct position and avoids any out-of-bounds access regardless of how many cards are currently displayed.

```kotlin
    private fun updateCardState(cardType: CardType, enabled: Boolean) {
        val currentCards = _uiState.value?.toMutableList() ?: return
```

  2→
  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  4→import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  5→import kotlinx.coroutines.cancel
  6→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
  7→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
  8→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
  9→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker
 10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 11→import org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFeatureUtils
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.jetpack.JetpackCapabilitiesUseCase
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.items.listitem.ListItemAction
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.items.listitem.SiteItemsBuilder
 18→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 19→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 20→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 21→import javax.inject.Inject
 22→import javax.inject.Named
 23→
 24→const val SHORTCUT_NAME_TRACKING_PARAMETER = "type"
 25→
 26→class ShortcutsPersonalizationViewModelSlice @Inject constructor(
 27→    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 28→    private val siteItemsBuilder: SiteItemsBuilder,
 29→    private val jetpackCapabilitiesUseCase: JetpackCapabilitiesUseCase,
 30→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils,
 31→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 32→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 33→) {
 34→    lateinit var scope: CoroutineScope
 35→
 36→    fun initialize(scope: CoroutineScope) {
 37→        this.scope = scope
 38→    }
 39→
 40→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(ShortcutsState(emptyList(), emptyList()))
 41→
 42→    val uiState: StateFlow<ShortcutsState> = _uiState
 43→
 44→    fun start(site: SiteModel) {
 45→        convertToShortCutsState(
 46→            items = siteItemsBuilder.build(
 47→                MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.SiteItemsBuilderParams(
 48→                    site = site,
 49→                    activeTask = null,
 50→                    backupAvailable = false,
 51→                    scanAvailable = false,
 52→                    enableFocusPoints = false,
 53→                    onClick = { },
 54→                    isBlazeEligible = isSiteBlazeEligible(site)
 55→                )
 56→            ),
 57→            site.siteId
 58→        )
 59→        updateSiteItemsForJetpackCapabilities(site)
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    private fun convertToShortCutsState(items: List<MySiteCardAndItem>, siteId: Long) {
 63→        val listItems = items.filterIsInstance(MySiteCardAndItem.Item.ListItem::class.java)
 64→        val shortcuts = listItems.map { listItem ->
 65→            ShortcutState(
 66→                icon = listItem.primaryIcon,
 67→                label = listItem.primaryText as UiString.UiStringRes,
 68→                disableTint = listItem.disablePrimaryIconTint,
 69→                isActive = isActiveShortcut(listItem.listItemAction, siteId),
 70→                listItemAction = listItem.listItemAction
 71→            )
 72→        }
 73→        groupByActiveAndInactiveShortcuts(shortcuts)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    private fun groupByActiveAndInactiveShortcuts(shortcuts: List<ShortcutState>) {
 77→        _uiState.value = ShortcutsState(
 78→            activeShortCuts = shortcuts.filter { it.isActive },
 79→            inactiveShortCuts = shortcuts.filter { !it.isActive }
 80→        )
 81→    }
 82→
 83→    private fun updateSiteItemsForJetpackCapabilities(site: SiteModel) {
 84→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 85→            jetpackCapabilitiesUseCase.getJetpackPurchasedProducts(site.siteId).collect {
 86→                convertToShortCutsState(
 87→                    items = siteItemsBuilder.build(
 88→                        MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.SiteItemsBuilderParams(
 89→                            site = site,
 90→                            activeTask = null,
 91→                            backupAvailable = it.backup,
 92→                            scanAvailable = (it.scan && !site.isWPCom && !site.isWPComAtomic),
 93→                            enableFocusPoints = false,
 94→                            onClick = { },
 95→                            isBlazeEligible = isSiteBlazeEligible(site)
 96→                        )
 97→                    ),
 98→                    siteId = site.siteId
 99→                )
100→            } // end collect
101→        }
102→    }
103→
104→    private fun isSiteBlazeEligible(site: SiteModel) =
105→        blazeFeatureUtils.isSiteBlazeEligible(site)
106→
107→    fun onCleared() {
108→        this.scope.cancel()
109→        jetpackCapabilitiesUseCase.clear()
110→    }
111→
112→    // Note: More item is not a list item and hence the check is dropped here, it will be shown as a quick link always
113→    private fun isActiveShortcut(listItemAction: ListItemAction, siteId: Long): Boolean {
114→        return when (listItemAction) {
115→            in defaultShortcuts() -> {
116→                appPrefsWrapper.getShouldShowDefaultQuickLink(
117→                    listItemAction.toString(), siteId
118→                )
119→            }
120→
121→            else -> {
122→                appPrefsWrapper.getShouldShowSiteItemAsQuickLink(
123→                    listItemAction.toString(), siteId
124→                )
125→            }
126→        }
127→    }
128→
129→    private fun defaultShortcuts(): List<ListItemAction> {
130→        return listOf(
131→            ListItemAction.POSTS,
132→            ListItemAction.PAGES,
133→            ListItemAction.STATS
134→        )
135→    }
136→
137→    fun removeShortcut(shortcutState: ShortcutState, siteId: Long) {
138→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
139→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
140→                AnalyticsTracker.Stat.PERSONALIZATION_SCREEN_SHORTCUT_HIDE_QUICK_LINK_TAPPED,
141→                mapOf(SHORTCUT_NAME_TRACKING_PARAMETER to shortcutState.listItemAction.trackingLabel)
142→            )
143→            if (shortcutState.listItemAction in defaultShortcuts())
144→                updateVisibilityOfDefaultShortcut(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, false)
145→            else updateVisibilityOfListItem(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, false)
146→            updateUiState(shortcutState, isActive = false)
147→        }
148→    }
149→
150→    fun addShortcut(shortcutState: ShortcutState, siteId: Long) {
151→        scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
152→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
153→                AnalyticsTracker.Stat.PERSONALIZATION_SCREEN_SHORTCUT_SHOW_QUICK_LINK_TAPPED,
154→                mapOf(SHORTCUT_NAME_TRACKING_PARAMETER to shortcutState.listItemAction.trackingLabel)
155→            )
156→            if (shortcutState.listItemAction in defaultShortcuts())
157→                updateVisibilityOfDefaultShortcut(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, true)
158→            else updateVisibilityOfListItem(shortcutState.listItemAction, siteId, true)
159→            updateUiState(shortcutState, isActive = true)
160→        }
161→    }
162→
163→    private fun updateUiState(shortcutState: ShortcutState, isActive: Boolean) {
164→        // is active means changed to active from inactive
165→        val currentState = _uiState.value
166→        val updatedState = shortcutState.copy(isActive = isActive)
167→        val activeShortcuts = currentState.activeShortCuts.toMutableList()
168→        val inactiveShortcuts = currentState.inactiveShortCuts.toMutableList()
169→        if (isActive) {
170→            inactiveShortcuts.remove(shortcutState)
171→            activeShortcuts.add(updatedState)
172→        } else {
173→            activeShortcuts.remove(shortcutState)
174→            inactiveShortcuts.add(updatedState)
175→        }
176→        _uiState.value = ShortcutsState(
177→            activeShortCuts = activeShortcuts,
178→            inactiveShortCuts = inactiveShortcuts
179→        )
180→    }
181→
182→    private fun updateVisibilityOfListItem(listItemAction: ListItemAction, siteId: Long, shouldShow: Boolean) {
183→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldShowSiteItemAsQuickLink(
184→            listItemAction.toString(), siteId, shouldShow
185→        )
186→    }
187→
188→    private fun updateVisibilityOfDefaultShortcut(listItemAction: ListItemAction, siteId: Long, shouldShow: Boolean) {
189→        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldShowDefaultQuickLink(
190→            listItemAction.toString(), siteId, shouldShow
191→        )
192→    }
193→}
